title: lobelia setulosa
intro: Lobelia setulosa, also known as the hairy lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of lobelia setulosa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Lobelia setulosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
